project_desc: Standardizing Docker environments and namespace for financial data processing.
project_content: This project involved complex Docker orchestration, namespace standardization across microservices, and setting up automated deployment pipelines for VPS and Vercel environments.
ai_architecture: Microservices with standardized namespace and containerized deployment pipelines.
ai_market_intel: Enterprise compliance automation with high revenue potential in fintech.

project_desc: A comprehensive tracking platform for Initial Coin Offerings and market trends.
project_content: Developed a real-time data ingestion engine for tracking ICOs, featuring advanced charting, sentiment analysis, and investor dashboards.
ai_architecture: Real-time data ingestion engine with WebSocket updates and sentiment analysis pipeline.
ai_market_intel: High-demand market for crypto insights; scalable SaaS model.

project_desc: Personalized travel planning and booking optimization using AI.
project_content: Built an intelligent travel companion that optimizes booking prices and creates custom itineraries based on user preferences and historical data.
ai_architecture: LLM-driven agent architecture for itinerary planning and price optimization.
ai_market_intel: Disruptive potential in travel tech; B2C subscription model.

project_desc: A luxury online casino platform reconstructed with a focus on UX and security.
project_content: Redesigned the entire user journey for a premium gambling experience, integrating high-performance gaming engines and robust security protocols.
ai_architecture: High-concurrency gaming engine with secure payment gateway integration.
ai_market_intel: High-conversion gaming platform targeting the premium market.

project_desc: Monitoring and optimizing renewable energy consumption for smart homes.
project_content: A sophisticated IoT platform that tracks energy production from solar panels and automates home appliances to maximize efficiency.
ai_tech_stack: IoT Core, MQTT, React Native, TimescaleDB
ai_architecture: Real-time sensor data pipeline with predictive energy optimization models.
ai_market_intel: Growing sustainability market; B2B and B2C potential.

project_desc: Next-gen CRM tool for high-performing sales teams with integrated AI analytics.
project_content: Scalable CRM system featuring predictive lead scoring, automated outreach, and deep integration with existing enterprise communication tools.
ai_architecture: Distributed CRM architecture with AI-driven lead scoring and automated sales funnels.
ai_market_intel: Enterprise SaaS with strong recurring revenue potential.

project_desc: A concept OS focusing on neural interfaces and adaptive UI design.
project_content: Design and architectural exploration of an operating system that learns user habits to proactively surface relevant tools and information.
ai_architecture: Neural-first kernel design with adaptive UI generation based on brain-computer interface concept.
ai_market_intel: Edge-case innovation with long-term R&D value.

project_desc: Porovnávací nástroj pre online kasína a stávkové platformy s dátami v reálnom čase, výplatami a férovými podmienkami.
project_content: BetAuthority je pokročilý dátami riadený porovnávací nástroj pre online kasína a stávkové platformy. Systém analyzuje viac ako 127 operátorov, sleduje $2.4M+ výplat a poskytuje reálne informácie o dôveryhodnosti, rýchlosti výplat a férových podmienkach. Platforma zahŕňa vzdelávací hub pre stávkárov, analytické nástroje pre inteligentné rozhodovanie a overené platformy s rýchlymi výplatami. S 98.7% spokojnosťou používateľov a priemerným časom výplaty 2.1 hodiny, BetAuthority poskytuje transparentný pohľad na online hazardný trh.
ai_architecture: Automated data scraping and verification network for real-time betting audits.
ai_market_intel: Market leader in affiliate transparency and data-driven trust scoring.

project_desc: High-performance, privacy-focused communication platform built on Matrix protocol with ElysiaJS and React.
project_content: Neon Bloom Messenger is a complete communication infrastructure designed for privacy, speed, and premium aesthetics. Built on the Matrix protocol and powered by ElysiaJS (Bun) and React. Features include end-to-end encryption, ultra-fast backend, integrated file storage with MinIO, automatic updates via Watchtower, and full data control. The system provides a decentralized communication protocol with a brutalist premium UI design.
ai_architecture: Decentralized messaging infrastructure with E2E encryption and ultra-fast Bun-powered API.
ai_market_intel: Privacy-first communication niche with high growth potential.
